hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/(report/chapters|final/modules)/' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BRIGHT-LINE RULE: Before editing report prose, run the three checks: (1) Multi-paragraph scope? (2) Analytical claim alteration? (3) Sourced statement modification? If ANY is true, get operator approval first. Log to /logs/decisions.md."}' || exit 0; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/(preparation|execution|analysis|report)/' || exit 0; stage=$(echo "$f" | grep -oE '(preparation|execution|analysis|report)' | head -1); bn=$(basename "$f"); cd "$(dirname "$f")"; git add "$f" && git commit -m "Auto-commit [$stage]: $bn"; } 2>/dev/null || true

PROJECT_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; latest=$(ls -t "$PROJECT_DIR"/{preparation,execution,analysis,report}/checkpoints/**/*checkpoint* 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$latest" ]; then section=$(echo "$latest" | grep -oE '[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' | head -1); stage_dir=$(echo "$latest" | grep -oE '(preparation|execution|analysis|report)' | head -1); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"Session context: Section $section, Stage: $stage_dir. Latest checkpoint: $latest\"}}"; fi
d="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; while [ "$d" != '/' ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); [ -d "$d/ai-resources/.claude/hooks" ] && { "$d/ai-resources/.claude/hooks/check-template-drift.sh"; exit; }; done

d="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; while [ "$d" != '/' ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); [ -x "$d/ai-resources/.claude/hooks/auto-sync-shared.sh" ] && { "$d/ai-resources/.claude/hooks/auto-sync-shared.sh"; exit; }; done

PROJECT_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; recent=$(find "$PROJECT_DIR" -path '*/checkpoints/*checkpoint*' -mmin -120 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$recent" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"No checkpoint written this session. Consider running the checkpoint step before ending."}'; fi

PROJECT_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; NOTES="$PROJECT_DIR/logs/session-notes.md"; if [ -f "$NOTES" ] && tail -20 "$NOTES" | grep -q "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')"; then exit 0; fi; echo '{"systemMessage":"SESSION NOT WRAPPED. Run /wrap-session before ending. Without it: no session note, no coaching data, no innovation triage. Work from this session becomes invisible to future sessions."}'

PROJECT_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; DECISIONS="$PROJECT_DIR/logs/decisions.md"; jq -r '.transcript // empty' 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '(GATE|bright-line|PAUSE for operator)' && { input=$(jq -r '.user_input // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') — Operator decision: $input" >> "$DECISIONS"; } || true
